data.title: [af9e-77fc] RED: Write verification test for zero non-annotated runtime plugins/dso refs
data.description:
## What to do
Create tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh — RED bash test asserting zero non-annotated runtime plugins/dso references in non-comment lines.

## Test behavior
Must FAIL before migration is run.

```bash
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Test: zero non-annotated runtime plugins/dso refs in non-comment code lines
MATCHES=$(grep -rn "plugins/dso" plugins/dso/ --include="*.sh" \
  | grep -v "^\s*#" \
  | grep -v "plugin-self-ref-ok")
if [ -n "$MATCHES" ]; then
  echo "FAIL: Found non-annotated runtime plugins/dso references:"
  echo "$MATCHES"
  exit 1
fi
echo "PASS: Zero non-annotated runtime plugins/dso refs found"
```

## Also add to .test-index
```
plugins/dso/scripts/*.sh:tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh
plugins/dso/hooks/**/*.sh:tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh
```

## Files to create
- tests/hooks/test-no-plugin-runtime-refs.sh (chmod +x required)
- Update .test-index with mappings above

## testing_mode: RED
